title: ctenitis pulvinata
intro: Ctenitis pulvinata, also known as the pulvinate ctenitis fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to China, India, and Southeast Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ctenitis pulvinata include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antitumor activity. Ctenitis pulvinata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
